content: the faces riding in with the new season, and what you'll be fighting in the Boss Trial:

embeds.title: Pack-Caller
embeds.description: faint: gives away its own current attack/health across the horde

embeds.title: Twilight-Runt
embeds.description: fused of dawn and dusk, never idle

embeds.title: Cellar-Coil
embeds.description: positional patience — the longer it waits, the harder it lands

embeds.title: Draughtsman Moe
embeds.description: season 2 champion's tribute — rots the whole enemy line

embeds.title: The Gauntlet Boss
embeds.description: the thing waiting for you in the Boss Trial, 20:00 CET
